subject: [PATCH v4 05/21] mm/swap: add a new function to check if a swap entry is in swap cached.

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch adds a new function called is_swap_cached to the Linux kernel's mm/swap module. The function checks if a given swap entry is currently cached in memory, which is necessary for userfaultfd operations. To minimize overhead, it directly accesses the swap_map array using READ_ONCE. This abstraction will be useful when the virtual swap layer starts managing swap cache state.
